text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The year-end Grand Prix, the Arima Kinen, is
here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The paddock is filled with an excitement that's
different than usual.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe! We get to race together again, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! But... um, it's not the same as last time, is
it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...We're being watched. Fuji, you haven't been
cozying up with the younger students again, have
you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! What do you take me for? Besides, if that's
the truth, surely the fault lies with you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're the one turning heads and drawing
everyone's attention simply by being here.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I wonder this every time, but why are you like this?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll take that as a compliment. I must say, though,
I never thought you'd join such an intense lineup
again.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I haven't retired just yet, thank you. I've
merely been biding my time of late.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What are you here for, anyway? To make the younger students cry? Or to establish your lasting reign over everyone like a certain French king?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I haven't called it quits yet either. I have a feeling
we're both here for the same reason.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's fun to look badass once in a while, no?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"Once in a while"? Showing off is practically your
life purpose. I won't let you have the last laugh,
though. Not on the track, at least.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: S-Spe, Rob Roy, Fuji Kiseki, and Air Groove are running today?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I know this is the Arima Kinen, but this lineup is
the stuff of dreams!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
First it was the Japan Cup, and now it's the Arima
Kinen... How does all this awesome stuff keep
happening?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: This is gonna be incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash looks up after giving the list of racers
a once-over.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Everything looks fine. Let's be on our way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell that she is quietly burning with
anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The only thing that has changed is that I have new
obstacles to overcome. That's all.
choice_data_list:
Let's put everything we've got and more into
this one.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Natürlich—naturally. Challenging races make
things all the more worth it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll do whatever it takes to become a version of
myself I can be proud of!
